allow: Bash(python -c " from fontTools.ttLib import TTFont font = TTFont\(''C:/Projects/Personal/trenios-app-restaurant-app/Trenios/Trenios.Mobile/Resources/Fonts/FluentSystemIcons-Regular.ttf''\) cmap = font.getBestCmap\(\) for code, name in sorted\(cmap.items\(\)\): name_lower = name.lower\(\) if any\(k in name_lower for k in [''cart'', ''receipt'', ''arrow'', ''person'', ''globe'', ''table'', ''fire'', ''check'', ''add'', ''subtract'', ''delete'', ''dismiss'', ''chevron'', ''clock'', ''search'', ''sign_out'', ''food'', ''bag'', ''vehicle'', ''home'', ''lock'', ''warn'', ''refresh'', ''star'']\): print\(f''0x{code:04X} = {name}''\) ")
